# Panda Cafe Copilot Instructions

- Keep the project mobile-first and premium.
- Favor performance, accessibility, and clean component structure.
- Use React, Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, Lenis, and Swiper when relevant.
- Prefer subtle, smooth motion over heavy effects on low-end devices.
- Keep the code maintainable and production-ready.
